name: poppy
desc: A middle-aged village baker with a round friendly build, rosy cheeks, and a warm neutral expression. Auburn hair tucked under a cream puffy baker's hat. She wears a terracotta dress with a flour-dusted cream apron; one thumb shows a small old burn scar.
sheetHint: round friendly build, rosy cheeks, cream puffy baker's hat, auburn hair, terracotta dress, flour-dusted cream apron

expressions.happy: a huge open joyful laugh, mouth wide open with delight, eyes bright and crinkled with warmth
expressions.hollow: her brown eyes open but unfocused and distant, gazing through the viewer at nothing, face slack, all the cheer gone — subtle, quiet and sad, NOT zombie-like
expressions.laughing: caught mid-guffaw — eyes squeezed shut, head tipped slightly back, mouth wide open in a belly laugh
